title: 30 years of great flavours with Barcelos!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Hey George! It's time to...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - Hey George! It's time to party because Barcelos Flame Grilled Chicken is turning 30 this year! For three decades, we've been mastering the art of juicy, flame-grilled Portuguese chicken that's become a favourite - not just here in the Eastern Cape, but all around the world.


> Here at Barcelos, we're all about fresh, top-notch ingredients and the kind of authentic cooking that reminds you of home. Our star attraction?


The flame-grilled chicken. It's marinated just right, grilled over an open flame until it's perfectly crispy on the outside and deliciously tender on the inside. Every bite is packed with that signature peri peri flavour.

What really turns up the heat is our famous peri-peri sauce. This fiery treat comes straight from the heart of Africa and it's what gives our chicken that extra zing.

Whether you like it mild or you're all about that spice, we've got you covered. Our peri-peri sauce is sure to make your meal pop with flavour.

But it's not just about chicken. We've got a full menu to fill everyone up. From hearty burgers and fresh salads to sides that are perfect for sharing, there's something for every craving.

Don't forget to save room for dessert - our sweet treats are the perfect way to top off your meal.

As we look back on these 30 years, we're really grateful for all the love and support from you, our awesome customers. You've been with us every step of the way, and your love for our food keeps us fired up to keep bringing you the best meals in town.

So come on down, bring your friends and family, and let's make this celebration one for the books. Here's to 30 years of great flavours - and many more to come!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
